task_completion.description: Access the patient record for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Maria Santos' displayed in the FreeMED patient context, dashboard, or search results.
Look for a form or text editor within FreeMED designated for writing letters, correspondence, or patient notes.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct date for the letter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '2025-01-15' entered in a date input field within the letter creation form.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct subject for the letter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Hypertension Follow-Up Plan' entered in a subject, title, or description input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the required text into the letter body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the specified text starting with 'Dear Maria Santos' and containing keywords like 'hypertension', 'blood pressure', 'follow-up', and 'medication' in the main text area.

task_completion.description: Save the letter to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a success message indicating the letter was saved, the letter appearing in a list of patient documents/correspondence, or the letter being viewed in a read-only mode after saving.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeMED web interface to create the letter.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show a web browser interacting with FreeMED, rather than terminal commands or database queries.

integrity.description: The letter was created inside FreeMED, not a generic text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the text editor or form used is part of the FreeMED web application, not a separate program like Notepad or a local word processor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that no terminal windows are open showing scripts or commands used to directly insert the letter into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. Expected Date: 2025-01-15. Expected Subject: Hypertension Follow-Up Plan. Required Keywords in Body: hypertension, blood pressure, follow-up, medication.
